title: UITextField Text Listener : Swift
summary: Adding an editing event to a UITextField is something that is required most of the time. For views like UITextField , we can connect an IBAction with the event type as editing did end or value changed and get a callback for editing finished or value changed.
content: Adding an editing event to a UITextField is something that is required most of the time. For views like UITextField, we can connect an IBAction with the event type as editing did end or value changed and get a callback for editing finished or value changed.
